sql_array: CREATE TABLE TEST_XMLS (I INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, XMLVAL XMLType, name VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO TEST_XMLS VALUES (3, XMLType('<oil-rig xml:id="14a" water="0.413"/><oil-rig xml:id="14b" water="0.402"/>'), 'Oil Rig A');

SELECT e.I, e.name, e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp/empno') AS emp_exists, CASE WHEN isIRI(e.name) THEN 'Valid IRI' ELSE 'Invalid IRI' END AS iri_status FROM TEST_XMLS AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp/empno') = 1 AND isIRI(e.name) = TRUE;
SELECT e.I, e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp/empno') AS emp_exists FROM (SELECT * FROM TEST_XMLS WHERE name IS NOT NULL) AS e WHERE emp_exists = 1;
SELECT e.I, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp/empno') = 1) OVER (PARTITION BY e.I) AS count_exists FROM TEST_XMLS AS e GROUP BY e.I HAVING COUNT(e.XMLVAL) > 0;
SELECT e.I, e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp/empno'), isIRI(CONCAT('http://example.com/', e.name)) FROM TEST_XMLS AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp/empno') = 1 OR isIRI(e.name);
SELECT e.I AS employee_id, e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp/empno') AS emp_exists FROM TEST_XMLS AS e JOIN (SELECT I FROM TEST_XMLS WHERE name LIKE '%John%') AS j ON e.I = j.I;

SELECT e.I, e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp/empno') AS emp_exists FROM TEST_XMLS AS e WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TEST_XMLS AS sub WHERE sub.name = e.name AND sub.XMLVAL.existsNode('/po/pono') = 1) AND e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp/empno') = 0;
